## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat`)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation (`docs`)
- [ ] Refactor (`refactor`)
- [ ] Tests (`test`)
- [ ] CI/Build (`ci`/`build`)

## Checklist

- [ ] My commits follow [conventional commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] I added tests for my changes
- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets` is clean (pedantic = deny)
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo deny check` passes
- [ ] No primitives in struct fields; booleans expressed as enums
